name: San Antonio
author: rslurry
description:
Uses 2023 LODES data. Coverage spans from Jourdanton in the south, Hondo in the west, Seguin in the east, and Boerne in the north.
Includes demand for SAT airport; UTSA, TAMUSA, OLLU, StMU, TU, and UIW universities; the Alamo, San Antonio Missions National Historic Park, San Fernando Cathedral, Six Flags, SeaWorld, San Antonio Zoo, Natural Bridge Caverns, the Witte Museum, the DoSeum, and the Pearl.
